authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 225374, "Hobart Creek", Stream, CA, Alpine/Tuolumne Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":225374,"gaz_name":"Hobart Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":["Alpine","Tuolumne"],"objectid_1":57083,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13357866.1337, 4635326.1925 → 38.39464°N, 119.99575°W). Matches the file's existing coordinates (-119.9957, 38.3946) exactly; the creek's mapped mouth is consistent with the CCR citation describing it as tributary to Spicer Meadows Reservoir, and CDFW's Tuolumne Co. designation is one of the two counties GNIS lists for this cross-county-line stream.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(59) — Hobart Creek (Tuolumne Co.)
sources.quotedText: (59) Hobart Creek (Tuolumne Co.), tributary to Spicer Meadows Reservoir. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 2 trout Only artificial lures may be used.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General provisions for the §7.50(b) special-regulation waters list
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag limit; possession limit is also 2 trout per the general §7.50(a) rule limiting possession to one daily bag limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used; live or dead bait is prohibited.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
